positive: A whimsical and mystical forest animal character, an iridescent arctic fox with glowing azure fur accents, playfully balancing on a stack of carved celestial moons and glowing crystal lanterns. The fox has large, expressive, emerald eyes and is framed by bioluminescent ferns and gentle swirling nebula mist. Central composition, clean silhouette, highly detailed line work, strong contrast between the glowing subject and the deep forest shadows. Style of elegant, stylized digital illustration, vector art quality, designed for screen printing on apparel. Limited color palette of cool blues, deep greens, gold, and white. Perfect symmetry and composition. Studio lighting, high resolution, print-ready.
negative: blurry, low resolution, artifact, text, watermark, logo, typography, bad anatomy, mutated, extra limbs, disfigured, jpeg artifacts, out of frame, messy background, realistic photography, overly complex, grainy
